---
title: "test_report_engine.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_report_engine.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 4.18
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.83
---

## Intent
The `test_report_engine.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestReportEngine, setUp, test_signature_alfred, test_signature_odin, test_header_generation. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestReportEngine, setUp, test_signature_alfred, test_signature_odin, test_header_generation. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.report_engine](file://src.core.report_engine)

### Exports
- `TestReportEngine`
- `setUp`
- `test_signature_alfred`
- `test_signature_odin`
- `test_header_generation`
